chemistry.scope_summary: UV photochemical synthesis achieved productivity greater than 200 gm h⁻¹ using high power high-pressure Hg lamps in PhotoVap reactor

reactor.type: PhotoVap (rotary evaporator), Vortex Reactor, excimer reactor

light_source.type: LEDs, high power high-pressure Hg lamps, excimer lamp
light_source.position_relative_to_reactor: outside reactors, bank of high-powered LEDs

figures.caption: Figure 1.  The EuChemS periodic table of endangered elements, designed to mark the 2019 International Year of the Periodic Table. The area of each element gives a rough indication of its abundance on earth  on a logarithmic scale ; that means that the areasofthelesscommonelements(e.g.FrorAt)aremuchlargerthanonemightexpect.ReproducedfromtheEuChemSwebsite with permission. (Online version in colour.)

figures.flow_path: Components arranged in 3x3 grid pattern with vertical flow paths shown on sides leading to cross-shaped junction at bottom
figures.key_information: Modular reactor system with interchangeable components (P, E, T types) that can be arranged in different configurations, showing flow paths from vertical arrangements to cross-junction mixing
figures.caption: Figure 3.  A schematic representation of our vision for using different combinations of flow reactors from a central 'reactor pool' to assemble trains of reactors to deliver particular continuous multi-step processes for manufacturing complex organic molecules. (Online version in colour.)

figures.key_information: Two-pump flow system with T-mixer feeding into coiled reactor with external light source and computer monitoring
figures.caption: Figure 4.  Schematicofthe'PhotoVap'reactor,basedonastandardrotaryevaporator.Thecomponentsarelabelledasfollows: F reaction flask, the rotation of which creates a thin film of the reaction mixture on the inside surface of the flask; LEDs, light emitting diodes for promoting the reactions; R and P flasks containing the Reactant and Product solutions respectively. For further details, see [ 31 , 32 ]. | Scheme 1.  UV synthesis of Cookson's Dione, which has been carried out on a scale greater than 200 gm h −1   in the UV version of the PhotoVap [ 32 ].

figures.flow_path: vertical downward flow through circular mixing elements into cylindrical reactor
figures.key_information: Shows flow from multiple inlet streams (yellow arrows) through circular mixing elements marked with 'C' into a cylindrical reactor with alternating colored bands
figures.caption: Figure5.  TheVortexReactor.Inthismanifestation,thereactorconsistsofasmoothstainlesssteelcylinderinsideatransparent jacketed reactor. When the cylinder is rotated rapidly, it creates toroidal Taylor vortices which ensure that all of the solution is movedclosetosurfaceofthereactorwhereitcanbeirradiatedbylight(seeright-handpartofthefigure).Thereactionmixture isfeddownthecentreofthecylinderandexitsfro

figures.flow_path: multiple inlets feed into stirred reactor vessel with bottom outlet
figures.key_information: stirred tank reactor with mechanical agitation, multiple feed streams, and heating/cooling jacket indicated by colored annular space
figures.caption: Figure5.  TheVortexReactor.Inthismanifestation,thereactorconsistsofasmoothstainlesssteelcylinderinsideatransparent jacketed reactor. When the cylinder is rotated rapidly, it creates toroidal Taylor vortices which ensure that all of the solution is movedclosetosurfaceofthereactorwhereitcanbeirradiatedbylight(seeright-handpartofthefigure).Thereactionmixture isfeddownthecentreofthecylinderandexitsfro

figures.flow_path: gas from cylinder through valve and mass flow controller into mixing chamber, then through heated reactor tube to collection vessel
figures.key_information: Multi-zone heating system with separate heating elements, gas feed system with flow control, liquid collection at outlet
figures.caption: Figure 6.  Schematic diagram of a flow reactor for use in an annular exciplex/excimer lamp. The reactor itself consists of a stainless steel cold-finger with a co-axial feed tube running down its centre. The photoreactor itself consists of a quartz outer tube which allows the reaction mixture to flow through the annular volume between outer surface of the cold-finger and the inner surface of the q
Scheme 2.  A simple multi-step process combining photochemistry and acid catalysis [ 33 ].

translation_logic.batch_limitation: Not discussed - this is a perspective paper on flow photochemistry
translation_logic.flow_advantage: Enables 'reagentless' chemistry, reduces need for additional chemical reagents, provides sustainable manufacturing routes
translation_logic.what_changed: Implementation of flow reactors for photochemistry including PhotoVap, Vortex Reactor, and excimer reactors
translation_logic.safety_improvement: Reduced handling of hazardous materials through continuous processing

figure_descriptions: Modular reactor system with puzzle-piece configuration
PhotoVap reactor based on rotary evaporator with LED illumination
Vortex reactor with Taylor vortices for enhanced mixing

notes: This is a perspective paper focusing on reactor designs and applications rather than specific experimental data. Limited quantitative information available. Multiple reactor types discussed conceptually rather than experimentally validated.
